ShortDescription.Value: Adjust school sizes. Increase the number of students.

Publish.LongDescription:
### Adjust School Capacity (Redux)
Change how many students your schools can handle without adding more buildings.
- **Separate sliders** for Elementary, High School, College, and University - Lower or increase the number of students. - Convenient buttons to **Reset to Vanilla** defaults or **Quick Start** preset values.
### Notes
- Safe to remove or disable any time (set sliders to 100% for vanilla values) - Remove other mods that do school student sizing to avoid conflicts. - Mod is compatible with all my other mods. - Mod does not use Harmony or Reflection; more resilient to game updates.
### Support and Feedback
- If the mod helps you, give it a Like :) - Report issues on Github link, Forum link, or Discord.
### 12 Languages Hello, Bonjour, Hallo, Hola, Ciao, こんにちは, 안녕하세요, 你好, 你好, Cześć, Olá, Olá
### Credits
- River-Mochi – mod author - Inspired by Wayz's original School Capacity (retired) - Necko1996 – code update and testing
tags: city schools, education capacity, automatic increase school size controller
Publish.ChangeLog: * Increased elementarary and highschool limits to 1000%
